programme.title: Today Early News
programme.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: Love Upstream
programme.desc: Author Charlotte, a Chicago city girl, heads to the wilderness of Minnesota to write her new book. Her guide, Rob, doubts Charlotte's skills.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three celebrities take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: 9News
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: NRL Friday Night Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Friday Night footy with Dolphins v Panthers, live from TIO Stadium, Darwin. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 8:00PM AEST.

programme.title: NRL Friday Night Footy Post-Match
programme.desc: Join the Wide World of Sports team for the all the post-match NRL news and analysis.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Jackson Briggs travels with Lulu, a military dog, to the funeral of her handler. During their journey, the duo breaks laws and leaves no stone unturned in annoying each other.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three celebrities take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: Sir Adrian Gillespie brings Professor Leonard Clifton to Waratah National Park so he can take Skippy to a laboratory to study her and find out what makes her so intelligent.

programme.title: Global Shop
programme.desc: Home shopping.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie visits the Frankston Sand Sculpting Competition. Madeline is in QLD, making furry friends at a Wildlife Sanctuary. Lauren tries a unique high tea in Carlton. And Tim Campbell and Paulini take a tour of iconic CBD spots.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway, Shaynna Blaze is back, cruising through the spectacular French Riviera. Taking in the hotspots of Nice and Saint-Tropez, enjoying the best of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Weekend Today
programme.desc: Join the Weekend Today team as they bring you the latest in news, sport, weather, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra - Saturday
programme.desc: The best of the program, featuring an exciting mix of highlights from the week in review. Includes the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, the latest in fashion, and more.

programme.title: Open for Inspection
programme.desc: Approachable homes offering value, potential, and smart choices for first-time buyers.

programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Explore TV-Viking
programme.desc: Continuing his journey aboard the Viking Tir in Germany, Trevor visits the streets of Passau, learns about traditional gingerbread in Kelheim, and immerses himself in the history of Nuremberg.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Celebrate Geek culture with the event that transforms Brisbane's West End into little Athens. The history, arts and food take centre stage as we meet the people making the 50th year of Paniyiri the biggest yet.

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.desc: On today's show Nikki explores the twin town of Dongara-Dennison, Kelly experiences the luxury of a private tour through WA and Will dives into the fun to be had in the magical Town of Pemberton.

programme.title: Taronga: Who's Who in the Zoo
programme.desc: After a 16-month gestation, Kufara the 13-year-old Black Rhino has gone into labour with her second calf.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: This week on The Garden Gurus, the team explores the Melbourne International Flower & Garden Show. Trevor checks out grass varieties and Bonnie shares tips for designing a water-wise garden.

programme.title: 9News First at Five
programme.desc: Join the 9News First At Five team for all the latest from around the country as well as sport and weather.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway, Shaynna Blaze winds up her cruise through the Med, stopping in Corsica, Rome before heading back to the French Riviera and the famous towns of Antibes and Cannes.

programme.title: 9News Saturday
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Belinda's clutter is causing conflict with her family and has turned their home into a minefield for injured husband James. As Peter battles to restore harmony, Cherie takes on a retro-inspired renovation.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Juggling a demanding career as a young lawyer as well as preparations for her wedding to the man of her dreams, Elle Woods faces another hurdle after she is fired from her job as a result of Bruiser, her Chihuahua.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike takes to the stage again, following a business deal that went bust leaving him broke in Florida. Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: Open for Inspection
programme.desc: Approachable homes offering value, potential, and smart choices for first-time buyers.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey Presents
programme.sub-title: The Moabite Stone and the Story of Ruth
programme.desc: Religious program.
